query: Why is our quality gate red on this pull request? Break down exactly which conditions failed and by how much.
How much technical debt has piled up in the codebase, and which files carry the worst maintainability rating?
Give me the coverage and duplication numbers for the develop branch and flag the modules that regressed.
List every unresolved BLOCKER and CRITICAL vulnerability SonarCloud found, with file and line, so I know what to fix first.
Pull the security hotspots that still need review and summarize the risk for each.
Show me how our reliability and security ratings have trended over the last month of analyses.
Go through all the open PR review threads from Greptile and CodeRabbit, reply to each explaining the fix, and mark them resolved.
Run lint, type-check, the test suite, and the security scanner and give me fresh output before I ship this branch.
Fix the SQL-injection vulnerability SonarCloud flagged in login.ts and add a regression test.
Produce a competitive market report comparing SonarCloud, Snyk, and Codacy for our tooling decision.
